app/tbc/templates/activity.html.text:
One block is shown for each event recording, grouped by event type and color. Select a block
    to open that camera's timeline for the day. Continuous 24/7 recording is intentionally omitted
    here; use the timeline for an individual camera instead. Enable "SD card recordings" to also
    include recordings stored on cameras that support an on-camera archive.
No event recordings are available for this day.
app/tbc/templates/activity.html.known_german: Keine Ereignisaufnahmen für diesen Tag verfügbar.

app/tbc/templates/api_access.html.text: Provides read-only TBC content (cameras, recordings, activity, and status) under
for external scripts, dashboards, or Home Assistant, and exposes the same content as MCP tools for an AI agent (Claude Desktop, Claude Code, etc.) under
Each example shows the exact request and a realistic example response containing every field TBC actually returns. Replace
with the generated API key above. See
for details and all query parameters.
The same content is available as MCP tools for an AI agent instead of REST endpoints. Every tool invokes the same logic as its corresponding REST endpoint above. See
for client configuration details (Claude Code, Claude.ai, and generic JSON clients).

app/tbc/templates/camera_detail.html.text: Note: The host starts with 192.169. On home networks, 192.168 is often intended.
app/tbc/templates/camera_detail.html.known_german: Hinweis: Host beginnt mit 192.169. Im Heimnetz ist oft 192.168 gemeint.

app/tbc/templates/camera_detail.html.text: The full URL is stored securely and redacted in the interface.
app/tbc/templates/camera_detail.html.known_german: Die vollständige URL wird geschützt gespeichert und in der Oberfläche zensiert.

app/tbc/templates/camera_detail.html.text: Enable local AI detection for this camera before selecting these recording triggers.
Detections produced by the TBC server's image model, independently of the events reported by the camera.
Enable local AI detection for this camera

Draw areas on the latest camera image. Exclusion zones ignore detections inside them (for example, a road in the background),
      inclusion zones count a class only inside the zone (for example, the driveway), and loitering zones trigger only when a class
      remains inside continuously for at least the configured duration (for example, a person waiting at the door). Without zones,
      local AI detection evaluates the entire image.
Select points in the image (at least 3). Double-click to close the zone.
No zones have been defined yet

The device status is being retrieved in the background or could not be reached recently. Commands can still be sent if the camera supports them; the status will be current the next time this page is opened.
app/tbc/templates/camera_detail.html.known_german: Gerätestatus wird im Hintergrund abgerufen oder war zuletzt nicht erreichbar. Befehle können trotzdem gesendet werden, sofern die Kamera sie unterstützt; beim nächsten Aufruf dieser Seite ist der Status aktuell.

app/tbc/templates/camera_detail.html.text: This camera does not report any of the controls supported here via ONVIF (PTZ, floodlight, PIR, siren, battery, restart).
app/tbc/templates/camera_detail.html.known_german: Diese Kamera meldet über ONVIF keine der hier unterstützten Steuerfunktionen (PTZ, Flutlicht, PIR, Sirene, Akku, Neustart).

app/tbc/templates/camera_detail.html.text: Firmware updates are downloaded directly from reolink.com and written to the camera. The camera is unavailable during the update and restarts afterward. Do not interrupt the process.
app/tbc/templates/camera_detail.html.known_german: Firmware-Updates werden direkt von reolink.com heruntergeladen und auf die Kamera geschrieben. Die Kamera ist währenddessen nicht erreichbar und startet danach neu. Den Vorgang nicht unterbrechen.

app/tbc/templates/camera_form.html.text: The full URL is stored securely and is always redacted in the interface.
app/tbc/templates/camera_form.html.known_german: Die vollständige URL wird geschützt gespeichert und in der Oberfläche immer zensiert.

app/tbc/templates/camera_modules.html.text: Camera plugins contain executable Python code. Only import packages from trusted sources. Maximum file size: 10 MB.
app/tbc/templates/camera_modules.html.known_german: Kamera-Plugins enthalten ausführbaren Python-Code. Importiere nur Pakete aus vertrauenswürdigen Quellen. Maximale Dateigröße: 10 MB.

app/tbc/templates/camera_new_choice.html.text: Enter the host/IP, ONVIF settings, and credentials directly for a single camera or an NVR on the local network.
app/tbc/templates/camera_new_choice.html.known_german: Host/IP, ONVIF und Zugangsdaten direkt eintragen - für eine einzelne Kamera oder ein NVR im lokalen Netzwerk.

app/tbc/templates/camera_new_choice.html.text: Sign in to a vendor cloud account (e.g. UniFi Protect, Eufy Security, eWeLink) and discover devices automatically.
app/tbc/templates/camera_new_choice.html.known_german: Bei einem Hersteller-Cloud-Konto (z. B. UniFi Protect, Eufy Security, eWeLink) anmelden und Geräte automatisch suchen.

app/tbc/templates/license.html.text:
TBC Camera Manager is built on top of the open-source projects below. Each is used under its own license, listed
    with a link to its source. This list covers direct dependencies and the pretrained models TBC downloads
    automatically (e.g. for AI detection and face/plate recognition) - it does not cover every transitive dependency.

app/tbc/templates/live.html.text: The size and order of each tile are adjusted directly on the image: tools appear in the top-right corner on hover (⠿ moves, ⤡ resizes).
app/tbc/templates/live.html.known_german: Größe und Reihenfolge jeder Kachel werden direkt am Bild eingestellt: Werkzeuge oben rechts erscheinen beim Überfahren mit der Maus (⠿ verschiebt, ⤡ ändert die Größe).

app/tbc/templates/partials/notification_.known_german: URL / Nutzer bei Pushover / HA-URL / ntfy-Themen-URL / Gotify-Server-URL

app/tbc/templates/partials/notification_.text: Token (ntfy Access Token / Gotify App Token)

app/tbc/templates/plugin_sources.html.text: External sources install plugins directly from a public GitHub repository instead of requiring a manual ZIP upload. Synchronizing downloads and installs the latest version again; only public repositories are supported. Each registered source is also checked hourly for a newer update; see
app/tbc/templates/plugin_sources.html.known_german: Externe Quellen installieren Plugins direkt aus einem öffentlichen GitHub-Repository, statt eine ZIP-Datei manuell hochzuladen. Ein Sync lädt und installiert den aktuellen Stand erneut; nur öffentliche Repositories werden unterstützt. Jede registrierte Quelle wird zusätzlich stündlich automatisch auf ein neueres Update geprüft - siehe

app/tbc/templates/plugin_sources.html.text: Preconfigured public repositories can be registered with one click and installed through the regular plugin validation path.
app/tbc/templates/plugin_sources.html.known_german: Vorkonfigurierte öffentliche Repositories können mit einem Klick registriert und über den normalen Plugin-Prüfpfad installiert werden.

app/tbc/templates/plugin_sources.html.text: A repository (or the specified subdirectory within it) must have the same structure as a manual ZIP import:
app/tbc/templates/plugin_sources.html.known_german: Ein Repository (oder der angegebene Unterordner darin) muss dieselbe Struktur wie ein manueller ZIP-Import haben:

app/tbc/templates/plugin_sources.html.text: folder containing pytest tests can be run directly in TBC using “Run tests”. The full reference is available in
app/tbc/templates/plugin_sources.html.known_german: -Ordner mit pytest-Tests kann direkt in TBC über „Tests ausführen“ gestartet werden. Die vollständige Referenz steht in

app/tbc/templates/plugin_sources.html.text: in the TBC repository, as well as
No external sources have been registered yet.

app/tbc/templates/plugin_updates.html.text:
Published GitHub releases are checked hourly. Updating to a new version is a manual operation
      (rebuild or pull the Docker image, or run

); there is intentionally no
      one-click installer for the application itself.

Every registered external source is checked hourly to see whether its branch/tag has advanced since the last installation (by comparing the commit SHA without downloading the entire repository). Only sources with an update that is actually available appear here.
app/tbc/templates/plugin_updates.html.known_german: Jede registrierte externe Quelle wird stündlich darauf geprüft, ob sich der Branch/Tag seit der letzten Installation weiterbewegt hat (Vergleich der Commit-SHA, ohne das ganze Repository herunterzuladen). Hier erscheinen nur Quellen mit einem tatsächlich verfügbaren Update.

app/tbc/templates/plugin_updates.html.text: All external sources are up to date.

app/tbc/templates/recognition.html.text:
Both features run entirely locally (no cloud service involved) and are off by default. "Snapshot" mode runs
    once a matching recording's clip has finished saving; "Live" mode runs during the camera's own local-AI
    detection loop, before any recording exists, for lower latency at the cost of extra CPU load per frame.

Models (opencv_zoo's YuNet/SFace for faces, fast-alpr's detector/OCR for plates) download automatically on
    first use into the detection-models volume - no manual download step needed.
No known faces enrolled yet - every detected face will be reported as "unknown".
app/tbc/templates/recognition.html.known_german: Noch keine Gesichter angelernt - jedes erkannte Gesicht wird als "unbekannt" gemeldet.

app/tbc/templates/recognition.html.text: No known plates yet - every recognized plate will be reported as "unknown".
app/tbc/templates/recognition.html.known_german: Noch keine bekannten Kennzeichen - jedes erkannte Kennzeichen wird als "unbekannt" gemeldet.

app/tbc/templates/settings.html.text:
API activation, API-key management, and examples of the available data and response
      formats are now collected on a dedicated page:
The debug log collects ongoing messages from the app and ffmpeg live processes. It is available as a pull-up in the bottom-right corner of every admin page.
app/tbc/templates/settings.html.known_german: Das Debug Log sammelt laufende Meldungen der App und ffmpeg-Live-Prozesse. Es ist auf jeder Admin-Seite unten rechts als Pull-up verfuegbar.
